name: Nest Prisma
description: Adds Prisma ORM (PostgreSQL) to a NestJS project and provides a custom resource generator that replaces `nest g res` — no tests, real DB queries.
author: oxide-cli

commands.name: install
commands.description: Sets up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL in the NestJS project

steps.replace:
"scripts": {
    "db:generate": "prisma generate",
    "db:push": "prisma db push",
    "db:migrate": "prisma migrate dev",
    "db:studio": "prisma studio",

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a NestJS resource (module, controller, service, DTOs) backed by Prisma — no tests, real DB queries

inputs.name: resource_name
inputs.description: Resource name in kebab-case (e.g. user, blog-post)
